label: plain_text
text:
Q.11. The number of t
tigers in India went down drastically
between1900a
and1970.
Project Tiger was launched in 1973 to track and protect tigers in India. Starting
in 2006, the exact number of tigers in India was tracked. Shagufta and Divya
looked up information about the number of tigers in India between 2006 and 2022
in 4-year intervals. They prepared a frequency table for this data and a bar graph
to present this data, but there are a few mistakes in the graph. Can you find those
mistakes and fix them?
